title: Assistant Store Manager - Westside - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Westside - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!
